Village 1.name: Village 1
Village 1.description: A quiet coastal hamlet often shrouded in ocean fog. Wooden houses and stone lamps line gravel paths bordered by low fences. Yuna's small wooden house sits at the heart of it.

Village 2.name: Village 2
Village 2.description: A working village built around a blacksmith's forge and archery range. The clang of hammer on anvil and the smell of pine and charcoal define it, with a stone water fountain and a sturdy wooden gate marking its center.

Village 3.name: Village 3
Village 3.description: A peaceful farming village with terraced farmlands, scattered wildflowers, and a Sacred Temple overlooking everything. Wooden bridges cross small streams between farmhouses and stone lanterns.
